error_signature: This operation expects the node’s input data to contain a binary file
title: Binary file upload error in Cloud Storage node
symptom: The Cloud Storage node fails to upload files, returning an error stating it expects binary file input but none was found.
applies_when: Data is merged from previous nodes
not_this_if: Files are uploaded successfully without merging
root_cause: The Merge node combines all attachments into a single data structure, which prevents the Cloud Storage node from recognizing individual binary files. This results in the error when the node attempts to upload the merged data.
fix_steps: Add a Split Out node after the Merge node
Configure the Split Out node to output individual binary files
Connect the Split Out node to the Cloud Storage node
Test the workflow to ensure files upload correctly
agent_instruction: Insert a Split Out node after the Merge node to handle individual binary file uploads.
